title: Validation Rules Family Skeleton
description: Skeleton only. Phase 1 Step 1 scaffold for the validation-rules family — declarative registry of validation rules across the 8 enforcement layers (Schema, Provisioning, Backend, SPFx, Site Health, Governance, Documentation, Cross-Layer). Not fully populated. Full extraction occurs in later Phase 1 steps (Phase 1 Step 2 — Enum and Validation Rule Extraction). The 30 initial rules (VR-01 through VR-30) defined in the Phase 0 Step 2 Validation Rule Table Plan are append-only inputs to this family. Cross-layer behaviors (e.g., "SPFx must not call Procore directly") are never enforced by JSON Schema alone — Enforcement Layer assignment must reflect that. Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §3.2, §11, §13, §17, §19, §22.
